name: Sift Heads - Cartels 4
short_description: Join Vinnie in a battle against powerful criminal organizations in Chicago. With his sidekicks Shorty and Kiro, navigate a dangerous world of violence and greed. Use special tactics, powerful weapons, and specialized skills to survive. Uncover secrets and be merciless.
detailed_description:
Not just anyone can stand up to such powerful and established criminal organizations.



Vinnie is the only real opposition, persistent and solid. Join him and dive into this bottomless sea of blood where violence and greed control everything! For the first time, we discover Chicago in a much more interactive way, with a ton of locations and enemies more dangerous than ever. It will take special tactics and equipment to overcome it. A street war is on the horizon and no one is safe. Vinnie can only count on his 2 sidekicks, Shorty & Kiro, to succeed. This is an arduous task that awaits them.
The end is coming...

  • Become a headhunter
  • Face the plague
  • Obtain powerful weapons
  • Acquire specialized skills
  • Reveal hidden secrets
  • Be merciless
